[
	{"bbox_2d": [777, 62, 926, 79], "text_content": "STUSB4500"},
	{"bbox_2d": [837, 111, 926, 126], "text_content": "Datasheet"},
	{"bbox_2d": [228, 149, 920, 166], "text_content": "Standalone USB PD sink controller with short-to-VBUS protections"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 201, 440, 215], "text_content": "Features"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 241, 713, 254], "text_content": "Auto-run Type-C™ and USB PD sink controller"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 257, 551, 268], "text_content": "Dead battery mode support"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 273, 768, 286], "text_content": "Up to 3 sink PDO configurable profiles (up to 20 V; 5 A)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 289, 656, 301], "text_content": "Dual high power charging path support"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 305, 694, 318], "text_content": "Integrated VBUS switch gate drivers (PMOS)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 321, 633, 334], "text_content": "Integrated VBUS voltage monitoring"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 337, 706, 350], "text_content": "Internal and/or external VBUS discharge paths"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 353, 713, 366], "text_content": "Short-to-VBUS protections on CC pins (22 V)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 369, 686, 382], "text_content": "High voltage capability on VBUS pins (28 V)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 385, 661, 400], "text_content": "Dual power supply (V SYS and/or V DD):"},
	{"bbox_2d": [440, 402, 561, 414], "text_content": "V SYS = [3.0 V; 5.5 V]"},
	{"bbox_2d": [440, 418, 561, 431], "text_content": "V DD = [4.1 V; 22 V]"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 434, 612, 447], "text_content": "Debug accessory mode support"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 450, 665, 463], "text_content": "Temperature range: -40 °C up to 105 °C"},

	{"bbox_2d": [358, 568, 477, 582], "text_content": "Applications"},

	{"bbox_2d": [398, 624, 759, 637], "text_content": "IoT, drones, accessories and battery powered devices"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 640, 587, 653], "text_content": "LED lighting and industrial"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 656, 597, 669], "text_content": "Toys, gaming, POS, scanner"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 672, 624, 685], "text_content": "Healthcare and handheld devices"},
	{"bbox_2d": [398, 688, 719, 701], "text_content": "Any Type-C sink device up to 100 W (20 V; 5 A)"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 718, 466, 732], "text_content": "Description"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 752, 922, 763], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 is a USB power delivery controller that addresses sink up to 100 W"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 766, 915, 779], "text_content": "(20 V; 5 A). It implements a proprietary algorithm to allow the negotiation of a power"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 781, 913, 794], "text_content": "delivery contract with a source without MCU support (auto-run mode). PDO profiles"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 795, 656, 808], "text_content": "are configured in an integrated non-volatile memory."},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 809, 917, 822], "text_content": "The device supports dead battery mode and is suited for sink devices powered from"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 824, 915, 837], "text_content": "dead battery state and requiring high power charging profile to be fully operational."},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 838, 913, 851], "text_content": "Thanks to its 20 V technology, it implements high voltage features to protect the CC"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 853, 891, 866], "text_content": "pins against short-circuits to VBUS up to 22 V and to support high voltage on the"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 867, 784, 880], "text_content": "VBUS pins directly connected to the VBUS power path up to 28 V."},
